security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; frame-ancestors 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'
